playbook.intent: End-of-engagement transition → client team (or another vendor) takes over → no Slack call to the outgoing dev for 30 days, AI agent on the receiving side answers correctly using the handover pack.
playbook.scope: Synthesis playbook for a clean transition out. Covers a hand-off where the client team OR another vendor takes over. Output: 30-day silent period from the outgoing dev's calendar, an AGENTS.md the receiving team's AI agent can use, a decision-log reconstructed from git where docs trailed, signed transition-out paperwork.

success-criteria.criterion: Receiving party has working AGENTS.md / system prompt
Decision log reconstructed where docs trailed

stage.name: Closure + lessons
stage.intent: Inhale lessons before the engagement memory fades.

tasks.task: Walk knowledge-areas detail with the receiving party
Comms plan for the next 30 days

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when closure deck is countersigned.

stage.name: Decision log + AGENTS.md
stage.intent: Hand over not just code, but reasoning.

tasks.task: Reconstruct decision log from git history where docs trailed
Build AGENTS.md for the receiving team's AI agent
Pair with receiving party on one walkthrough

stage.decision-gate: Advance when receiving team's AI agent answers 'why X' from the handover pack alone.

stage.name: Cutover + silence
stage.intent: Sign the transition-out paperwork; respect the 30-day silence.

tasks.task: Hold the 30-day silence — escalate via formal channels if needed

stage.decision-gate: Done when 30-day silence holds AND no critical escalation hits the outgoing dev.

extra.value: [Long structured 3-week handover — that's a deeper playbook, Hiring the receiving team — handled by client / vendor, Continued staff augmentation — explicitly NOT continued]
[Engagement end-date known, Receiving party identified (client or new vendor), Lessons-learned register exists]

[Leaving the outgoing dev on Slack 'just in case' — kills the silence period, Skipping decision-log reconstruction — receiving team rebuilds the wheel, AGENTS.md written for humans but ignored by AI agents — defeats the purpose]
['Did the receiving team merge a PR using only the handover pack?', 'Did we hit 30 days with zero Slack pings to the outgoing dev?', 'Was the transition-out doc signed, not just acknowledged?']

{human: faion get-content engagement-handover-transition-out --format md, agent: faion get-content engagement-handover-transition-out --format context, json: faion get-content engagement-handover-transition-out --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P4 outsource-specialist persona, synthesis angle'}]
